blocks.name: Membrane Distillation (DCMD)
blocks.description: Thermally-driven water-vapour transport across a hydrophobic membrane.

blocks.name: Multi-Effect Distillation
blocks.description: Multi-effect evaporation reusing vapour as heat; GOR and distillate.

blocks.name: Multi-Stage Flash
blocks.description: Staged flashing of recirculated brine at decreasing pressure.

blocks.name: Mechanical Vapour Compression
blocks.description: Evaporator driven by mechanically-compressed vapour; electrical duty.

blocks.name: Nanofiltration
blocks.description: Selective rejection of multivalent ions / small organics.

blocks.name: Ultrafiltration
blocks.description: Size-exclusion removal of macromolecules and colloids.

blocks.name: Forward Osmosis
blocks.description: Osmotically-driven water transport into a draw solution.

blocks.name: Pressure-Retarded Osmosis
blocks.description: Osmotic power generation from a salinity gradient.
